data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding notification delivery failure handling.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior for 'Notification delivery failure handling'. However, the evidence provided does not include any simulation or validation of this specific behavior, leading to an inconclusive status. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the booking process and do not address the expected outcome of the persona scenario, indicating a lack of relevant evidence.
gaps: No evidence of simulation or validation of the notification delivery failure handling behavior.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
